prerequisites: A BreezoMeter API key, found on your BreezoMeter account home page.
The latitude and longitude of the location you want to query.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by supplying your BreezoMeter API key in the api_key field. The connector uses this single key to authorize all requests to the BreezoMeter API.

setupSteps.title: Create a BreezoMeter account and get your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a BreezoMeter account. After signing in, copy the API key shown on your BreezoMeter account home page. This key is the only credential the connector requires.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter your key in the required api_key field. This is the connector's sole secret credential and authorizes every request.

setupSteps.title: Set the target location
setupSteps.body: Enter the required latitude and longitude fields with the coordinates of the location you want air quality and pollen data for.

setupSteps.title: Tune optional query parameters
setupSteps.body: Optionally set days_to_forecast and hours_to_forecast to control how far ahead forecast data is retrieved, historic_hours to pull past data, and radius to widen the data collection area. All four are optional and can be left unset to use defaults.
